name: Fabled Tortoise
description: Legendary Pangolin shield with massive capacity at the cost of max health. While it has any charge you are heavily slowed; when it is fully depleted you gain a large movement speed boost and increased jump distance.
notes: Very large capacity boosts may be limited by a hidden cap. Can roll a Torgue capacitor for explosive resistance, but cannot roll elemental immunity. At very high levels it can reduce max health to 1, letting chip damage bypass health-gate and trigger FFYL. Strong on Gaige due to high capacity and frequent restores; Sharing is Caring can pass the capacity to Deathtrap. Negative-capacity setups can keep the speed bonus, but effects requiring true 0 charge do not persist while below 0. Red text references The Tortoise and the Hare.

special.description: While shielded: 80% slower movement. When fully depleted: 50% faster movement. Massive shield capacity, reduced max health.
special.title: Win by a hare.
